texto: O Holy Spirit, give me a simple heart which will not retire within itself to savor its own sorrows, a heart magnanimous in giving itself, easily moved to compassion, a faithful, generous heart, which does not forget any favor received nor hold resentment for any injuries done to it.
explicacao: Citação de Leonce de Grandmaison sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “O Holy Spirit, give me a simple heart which will not retire within itself to savor its own sorrow…” articula fe, compassion, meekness em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como meekness.
